help__hero__subtitle: Quick answers, step-by-step guides, and a way to reach a human when you need one.
help__resource__guide__desc: Everything from setup to keepsakes, in plain English.
help__resource__videos__desc: Watch short tutorials for the trickiest parts.
help__resource__chat__desc: Mon–Fri, 9–18 CET. Average reply under 5 minutes.
help__resource__email__desc: We reply within 24 hours, weekends included.
help__faq__subtitle: Tap a question to expand the answer.
help__faq__getting_started__a: Create your event from the home page, set your couple names and wedding date, then share the link or QR code with guests. The kiosk and direct-link flows both work out of the box.
help__faq__kiosk_mode__a: Open Quick links → Kiosk on your tablet, hit Start kiosk on this device, and the screen locks into a guest-friendly welcome view. Set a 4-digit PIN in Lockdown to prevent guests from exiting.
help__faq__qr_code__q: Where do I find the QR code?
help__faq__qr_code__a: Quick links → QR code. Download as PNG or SVG, print it, and place it next to your kiosk or on table cards.
help__faq__languages__q: Can guests submit in different languages?
help__faq__languages__a: Yes. Add languages on the kiosk page. Guests can switch from the welcome screen if you enable the language picker.
help__faq__messages_storage__a: Storage depends on your plan. You'll see the expiry date on each event. Renew or upgrade from Settings to extend it.
help__faq__keepsakes__a: Production starts when you confirm the order. Lead times vary per product (3–45 days) and are shown on each keepsake page.
help__faq__billing__q: How do I change billing or cancel?
help__faq__billing__a: Settings → Account → Billing. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime. Refunds follow our 14-day policy.
help__contact__body: If you can't find what you need, drop us a line. Real people, real answers — no chatbot maze.
